title: Ahmad Notirdam
overview: A series of murders and kidnappings occur by an unknown killer, and the police begin to search for him, and when a young journalist discovers that the killer has been influenced by the well-known character (The Hunchback of Notre Dame), he disguises himself as a similar person and calls himself (Ahmed Notre Dame), and agrees with a girl to kidnap her in order to attract His killer, who already begins to search for him and communicate with him.
